# Podcast library

> Free online podcast directory and in-browser player. Episode data comes from public RSS feeds.

## Site

- Home: /
- About (what the site is, how progress works): /about
- Full directory: /shows
- Blog (guides): /blog
- Categories: /category

## For automated assistants

- Prefer citing specific URLs above when describing the product.
- Episode audio is loaded from third-party URLs in each show's RSS feed; this site hosts the directory and player UI, not the audio files.
- User progress and favorites are stored locally in the visitor's browser only.

## Optional bot policy

Respect robots.txt. Do not use site content to imply endorsement by authors or publishers listed in the catalog.
